pbcoreDescriptionDocument.pbcoreDescription: Show #648 duration 23:46 ?Show #649 duration 28:29 ??Show #648 Description:?BRIDGE WORK ON SCHEDULE: The head engineer with the New York State Department of Transportation talks about the progress being made in construction of the new bridge over Lake Champlain at Crown Point. John Grady says the project is on schedule and on budget. He says the projected date for the opening of the new bridge is October 9th of 2011. ??LAKE PLACID CONFERENCE CENTER: Work on Lake Placid's new convention center is back on track and on schedule to open in March of 2011. ORDA already has several major events booked beginning in May that officials say will bring in more than 2-million dollars to the local economy during what is traditionally the region's off-season. ??HISTORIC RENOVATION: Jack LaDuke reports on a multimillion dollar renovation is underway to turn the historic school in Willsboro, New York into senior housing that'll create dozens of new jobs. ??INSIDE JOB: Our film critic Rick Kisonak reviews a new documentary that is the first film to provide a comprehensive analysis of the global financial crisis in 2008. ???Show #649 Description:?Laurentian announcement, Roundtable with Congressman Bill Owens, Catherine Gardens ribbon cutting

pbcoreInstantiation.instantiationLocation: MLPBS Media Library; Rack 6: Shelf V1
